'''jafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jadedly|jadedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jadedly|jadedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jafate|jafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafatesher|jafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafatesherĂ«m|jafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafatero|jafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafateshĂ«|jafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafateshĂ«m|jafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafatero|gokijafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafateshĂ«|gokijafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafateshĂ«m|gokijafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafankerom|gojafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafankeshĂ«|gojafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafankeshĂ«m|gojafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafankeya|gojafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafaterom|jafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafatemu|jafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafateya|jafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafaterom|gokijafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafatemu|gokijafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafateya|gokijafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafafate|jafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafafatesher|jafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafafatesherĂ«m|jafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafafatero|jafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafafateshĂ«|jafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafafateshĂ«m|jafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafafatero|gokijafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafafateshĂ«|gokijafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafafateshĂ«m|gokijafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafafankerom|gojafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafafankeshĂ«|gojafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafafankeshĂ«m|gojafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafafankeya|gojafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafafaterom|jafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafafatemu|jafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafafateya|jafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafafaterom|gokijafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafafatemu|gokijafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafafateya|gokijafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠte|jĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠtesher|jĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠtero|jĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠfĂŠtero|gokijĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠteya|jĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠfĂŠterom|gokijĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠfĂŠteya|gokijĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafafte|jafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafaftesher|jafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafaftesherĂ«m|jafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafaftero|jafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafafteshĂ«|jafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafafteshĂ«m|jafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafaftero|gokijafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafafteshĂ«|gokijafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafafteshĂ«m|gokijafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafafnkerom|gojafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafafnkeshĂ«|gojafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafafnkeshĂ«m|gojafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafafnkeya|gojafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafafterom|jafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafaftemu|jafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafafteya|jafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafafterom|gokijafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafaftemu|gokijafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafafteya|gokijafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
